rules.section: Personal Information Protection Act (Alberta), s.15 (employee personal information)
rules.reason: Alberta PIPA s.15 requires reasonable notice to employees before collection, use or disclosure of employee personal information. Silent collection is a contravention.
rules.remediation_hint: Provide written notice describing the purposes for which employee personal information will be collected, used and disclosed.

rules.section: PPCLA, Part 2 (holdback) and Part 4 (prompt payment, effective 2022-08-29)
rules.reason: Alberta Prompt Payment and Construction Lien Act mandates payment of a proper invoice within 28 days and prohibits waiver of the statutory holdback (10% in most cases).
rules.remediation_hint: Net 28 days from proper invoice; 10% holdback released per the Act.
